subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Through the grace of the Self-Subsisting Name ye have quaffed from the sealed wine and attained unto the knowledge of God, which is the cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت اسم قیوم از رحیق مختوم آشامیدید و بعرفان الله که سبب و علت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
